utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: 
- property: includes selected property with address, detailed features, and price -> fully specified.
- financing: includes solution type, terms (down payment, rate, term, amortization), and an arrangement fee -> fully specified.
- legal_services: includes package and costs -> fully specified.
- moving_services: includes package and costs -> fully specified.
- setup_services: includes description and costs -> fully specified.
- total_budget: provides cost breakdown with line items and a summed total initial outlay figure -> fully specified.
All 6 items are present and detailed.
